all_receiver_relations_fully_available.reason: The adjacent_near actor has no qualified Sparse4Dv3 association at t=6.5 s, making two of four relation comparisons unavailable at one planned receiver timestamp.

general_hugsim_ad_test_domain_fitness.reason: The audit covers one scene, one actor asset, one frozen supporting receiver and a designed factor range without real-world-qualified uncertainty bounds or AD planning/control.

all_predeclared_geometry_relations_hold.component: recorded HUGSIM state plus independent planar geometry analysis
all_predeclared_geometry_relations_hold.expected: Every dominant condition has smaller forward/lateral factor value, ego-footprint clearance and planned-corridor clearance at every complete-future timestamp.
all_predeclared_geometry_relations_hold.observed: All four relations pass at all 26 timestamps; every minimum comparison margin is positive.
all_predeclared_geometry_relations_hold.implication: The intended designed interventions are geometrically valid in HUGSIM's recorded state, without establishing independent real-world state truth.

adjacent_near_end_window_association_gap.component: HUGSIM RGB/calibration to frozen Sparse4Dv3 receiver interface
adjacent_near_end_window_association_gap.expected: The injected actor has a qualified association at every one of the 13 complete-future receiver timestamps.
adjacent_near_end_window_association_gap.observed: The adjacent_near association is unavailable at t=6.5 s; all other available predeclared comparisons preserve the expected direction.
adjacent_near_end_window_association_gap.implication: Full temporal receiver support is not established, while the cause remains unresolved among rendering, calibration/domain shift and receiver behavior.

valid_window_no_actor_vehicle_baseline.expected: No injected-actor association is inferred from the no-actor condition inside the declared audit window.
valid_window_no_actor_vehicle_baseline.observed: Zero qualified vehicle detections occur in the 13 receiver timestamps inside (0, 6.5] s; one low-confidence car response exists only at t=0.
valid_window_no_actor_vehicle_baseline.implication: The ordinal comparisons are not explained by a valid-window vehicle response already present in the paired no-actor input.

claim_boundary: Designed-range planar and receiver ordinal evidence only; no calibrated real-world risk, real-sensor equivalence, AD planning/control, direct real-sim equivalence or general simulator fitness claim.
